title: Supabase production RLS advisor fix
summary_text: Supabase production RLS security issue resolved for haaxgwyimoqzzxzdaeep. Enabled RLS and removed anon/authenticated direct table access on cockpit_tasks, cockpit_git_repos, cockpit_alerts, digest_reports, quoted_authors, quoted_sources, quote_events; preserved service_role access. Production verification passed: Security Advisor rls_disabled_in_public=0 and ERROR=0, anon REST probes 401, service_role REST probes 200, x-auto quoted-author schema smoke 200, health-check smoke 200, line-webhook GET 200, line-bot GET 200, no recent RLS/permission errors in function logs.
